title: Property Consultant - Mindspace Business Parks REIT - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mindspace Business Parks REIT - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
